# ISiK Basismodul Fixtures

These fixtures were fetched from:

`gematik/app-referencevalidator-plugins/valmodule-isik3-basismodul/src/main/resources/plugin/test-files/ISiK-Basismodul`

The upstream `valid` and `invalid` folder names are preserved. Matching conformance case wrappers live under `tests/conformance/isik3-basismodul/` and reference these files via `fixturePath`.
